title: ANGIX 4 x Citronella Candles in Glass Jar Holders Ideal for Mosquito, Fly Insect & Bugs Repellent Long-Lasting Outdoor Protection Candle Sets
features: Effective Insect Repellent :- The citronella candles are formulated to repel mosquitoes, insects, and bugs, providing you with uninterrupted outdoor enjoyment.
Versatile Usage :- Whether you're hosting a barbecue in the garden, relaxing on the patio, or camping under the stars, these candles are ideal for creating a bug-free environment.
Long-Lasting Protection :- Each candle offers long-lasting protection, ensuring extended hours of bug-free outdoor relaxation.
Fresh Scent :- Infused with a delightful fresh lime scent, these candles not only repel insects but also fill your surroundings with a pleasant fragrance.
Durable Construction :- The bucket candles come in a sturdy design, while the glass and tealight candles are crafted with precision for durability and safety.
description: Product Description Citronella Candles Citronella Tea Light Candles, Bucket Candles, and Glass Candles, Natural Mosquito Repellent and Ambient Lighting for Outdoor Spaces, Perfect for Gardens, Patios, and Outdoor Gatherings Natural Bug Repellent :- Infused with pure citronella oil, our candles effectively repel mosquitoes and other flying insects, allowing you to enjoy the outdoors in peace. Stylish Design :- Elegant designs and vibrant colours make these citronella candles both bug repellents and stylish outdoor accents, perfect for any enthusiast. Diverse Designs :- Choose from a variety of styles, including tea light candles, bucket candles & glass candles, to suit your preference & complement your outdoor decor. Long-Lasting Burn Time :- Each candle provide hours of protection, perfect for summer nights and outdoor events, ensuring uninterrupted relaxation and ambiance. Previous page Next page 1 Safe and Natural 2 Outdoor Essential! Enjoy the Outdoors Mosquito-Free! Pleasant Aroma :- Citronella candles emit a fresh, citrusy fragrance that not only wards off insects but also creates a delightful outdoor ambiance. Unlike chemical repellents, their natural aroma enhances the outdoor experience, making them a preferred choice for bug-free enjoyment. Outdoor Enhancement :- Citronella candles are essential for outdoor gatherings, adding ambiance and repelling bugs. Whether it's a backyard barbecue, camping trip, or patio relaxation, their warm glow enhances the atmosphere, ensuring a bug-free experience. Versatile Outdoor Companion :- From backyard barbecues to camping trips and beyond, these citronella candles are the perfect companion for all your outdoor adventures. Compact and portable, they're easy to transport and ideal for use in a variety of settings. Whether you're exploring the great outdoors or simply relaxing in your backyard, our candles help create a welcoming and bug-free environment wherever you go. Diverse Designs to Suit Your Style:- Choose from an array of stylish designs to complement your outdoor decor and personal taste. Whether you prefer the simplicity of tea light candles, the rustic charm of bucket candles, or the elegance of glass candles, our collection offers something for everyone. Enhance the ambiance of any outdoor setting with this versatile citronella candles, designed to elevate your outdoor experience in style. Perfect Companion for Any Outdoor Activity
